location: On a corpse on the upper floor of the Fortified Manor in Leyndell, Royal Capital — inside the building marked with a lion crest, lying next to the Sanctified Whetblade near an anvil.
tactics: From the Fortified Manor, First Floor grace, exit and go right past the dog enemies, then climb the wooden scaffolding on the building's side and squeeze through the broken wall.
Alternatively, drop down from the West Capital Rampart grace onto the lion-crest building and enter through the side shack with a body hanging off its roof.
It sits right beside the Sanctified Whetblade — grab both on the same trip.
This item becomes unobtainable once the area transforms into Leyndell, Ashen Capital, so collect it before advancing the main quest past that point.
lore: A stone head lashed to a metal haft, originally a blacksmith's tool rather than a weapon — the game notes smithing itself is said to trace back to the giants, and this tool's strikes still carry real heft.

builds.name: Early Quality Stance-Breaker
builds.why: Even D/D scaling in Strength and Dexterity plus a free Kick skill make it a reliable stagger tool for a quality build before finding a signature weapon.
